title: pilosella iserana subsp. subconfinium
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. subconfinium, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella iserana subsp. subconfinium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and other ailments.
